isi.lyrics:
Lyric Itzel - Little Girl

Romanization

Hey girl, What you thinking ‘bout?
yaeya, mwol geuri saenggakhani?
Too much, Too heavy on your mind
neomu mana, ne maeumsogi neomu mugeowo
If I’m looking at your eyes, I’ll say you’re gon’ trippin 20 times more
manyak naega ne nuneul bogo itdamyeon, neon 20beondo deo neomeojil georago malhae jul geoya
Good girl, don’t be sad about
chakhan sonyeo, neomu seulpeohajin ma
You know? life is not a dash
algo inni? salmeun danggeori dalligiga aniya
Keep on lookin’ at your eyes
gyesok ne nuneul barabwa
Nothin’ within lies
geojimmal sogen amugeotdo eomneun beobiya
Diamonds in your eyes
ne nun sogui daiamondeu
But you prayed to shine
geuchiman neon bitnage haedallago gidohaetji

Baby little girl
jageun sonyeoya
Where u go?
eodil geuri gani?
aju bappi jeongsineopsi
Baby little bird, blue bird
jageun parangsae
japgo sipeo eojireopji
It’s alright, right, right
gwaenchana
Put it some down down down
jom naeryeonwado dwae
Cuz go around round round
waenyamyeon gyesok dolgo dol tenikka
(nan nega wonhaneun geol alji geu simjang soril deureosseuni)

Little girl, Look at me
jageun sonyeoya, nal bwa
The missing piece, just right in here
ireobeoryeotdeon geu jogak, baro i sunggane isseo
Oh little girl, can’t you see?
o sonyeoya, boiji anni?
(Just right here, Oh right here)
(baro i gose, o i gose)
Little girl, Look at me
jageun sonyeoya, nal bwa
You’re lost in peace
neon pyeonghwa sogeseo gireul ireotji
Time to be real
jinjjaga doel siganira geurae
Oh little girl, grab your key
o riteulgeol, neomanui yeolsoereul jababwa

15 fantasy, Fancy melody
15sarui hwansang, meotjin mellodi
gwie kkotgo tan Red bus
gwie kkotgo tan ppalgan beoseu
Deepest dark in the sky
haneureun gajang eoduun saek
What u dreaming for? aiya
mueoseul kkumkkugo inni? aiya
“Nevermind” Who said?
“geokjeong ma” nuga malhan geoya?
Can’t hear, lost in thoughts
deulliji ana, saenggakdeure gireul ireosseo
Wanna find the key
dabeul chatgo sipeo
Oh God please give me
sinisiyeo jebal jege dabeul juseyo
Oh little girl,
o jageun sonyeoya,
Just take a breath AH-
sumeul swieobwa a-

Little girl, Look at me
jageun sonyeoya, nal bwa
The missing piece, just right in here
ireobeoryeotdeon geu jogak, baro i sunggane isseo
Oh little girl, can’t you see?
o sonyeoya, boiji anni?
(Just right here, Oh right here)
(baro i gose, o i gose)
Little girl, Look at me
jageun sonyeoya, nal bwa
You’re lost in peace
neon pyeonghwa sogeseo gireul ireotji
Time to be real
jinjjaga doel siganira geurae
Oh little girl, grab your key
o riteulgeol, neomanui yeolsoereul jababwa

Hey, Get up
The sun’s rising
We need to move
ireona,
haega tteugo isseo
umjigyeoya hae

Hangeul

Hey girl, What you thinking ‘bout?
얘야, 뭘 그리 생각하니?
Too much, Too heavy on your mind
너무 많아, 네 마음속이 너무 무거워
If I’m looking at your eyes, I’ll say you’re gon’ trippin 20 times more
만약 내가 네 눈을 보고 있다면, 넌 20번도 더 넘어질 거라고 말해 줄 거야
Good girl, don’t be sad about
착한 소녀, 너무 슬퍼하진 마
You know? life is not a dash
알고 있니? 삶은 단거리 달리기가 아니야
Keep on lookin’ at your eyes
계속 네 눈을 바라봐
Nothin’ within lies
거짓말 속엔 아무것도 없는 법이야
Diamonds in your eyes
네 눈 속의 다이아몬드
But you prayed to shine
그치만 넌 빛나게 해달라고 기도했지

Baby little girl
작은 소녀야
Where u go?
어딜 그리 가니?
아주 바삐 정신없이
Baby little bird, blue bird
작은 파랑새
잡고 싶어 어지럽지
It’s alright, right, right
괜찮아
Put it some down down down
좀 내려놔도 돼
Cuz go around round round
왜냐면 계속 돌고 돌 테니까
(난 네가 원하는 걸 알지 그 심장 소릴 들었으니)

Little girl, Look at me
작은 소녀야, 날 봐
The missing piece, just right in here
잃어버렸던 그 조각, 바로 이 순간에 있어
Oh little girl, can’t you see?
오 소녀야, 보이지 않니?
(Just right here, Oh right here)
(바로 이 곳에, 오 이 곳에)
Little girl, Look at me
작은 소녀야, 날 봐
You’re lost in peace
넌 평화 속에서 길을 잃었지
Time to be real
진짜가 될 시간이라 그래
Oh little girl, grab your key
오 리틀걸, 너만의 열쇠를 잡아봐

15 fantasy, Fancy melody
15살의 환상, 멋진 멜로디
귀에 꽂고 탄 Red bus
귀에 꽂고 탄 빨간 버스
Deepest dark in the sky
하늘은 가장 어두운 색
What u dreaming for? 아이야
무엇을 꿈꾸고 있니? 아이야
“Nevermind” Who said?
“걱정 마” 누가 말한 거야?
Can’t hear, lost in thoughts
들리지 않아, 생각들에 길을 잃었어
Wanna find the key
답을 찾고 싶어
Oh God please give me
신이시여 제발 제게 답을 주세요
Oh little girl,
오 작은 소녀야,
Just take a breath AH-
숨을 쉬어봐 아-

Little girl, Look at me
작은 소녀야, 날 봐
The missing piece, just right in here
잃어버렸던 그 조각, 바로 이 순간에 있어
Oh little girl, can’t you see?
오 소녀야, 보이지 않니?
(Just right here, Oh right here)
(바로 이 곳에, 오 이 곳에)
Little girl, Look at me
작은 소녀야, 날 봐
You’re lost in peace
넌 평화 속에서 길을 잃었지
Time to be real
진짜가 될 시간이라 그래
Oh little girl, grab your key
오 리틀걸, 너만의 열쇠를 잡아봐

Hey, Get up
The sun’s rising
We need to move
일어나,
해가 뜨고 있어
움직여야 해

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Itzel - Whoo!

Romanization

Whoo!
Never ending road
kkeuti eomneun gil
I’m so running out of breath
na neomu sumi cha
Whoo!
Can you hear their roar?
geudeurui pohyoreul deureonni?
It’s like tryna chat with me
machi naege mareul geoneun deuthae
All of my goosebumps up on me
nae ommome soreumi doda
Do you see me, huh?
bwasseo?
Do you feel me ,huh?
neodo neukkyeojyeo?
All of my goosebumps up on me
nae ommome soreumi doda
Do you see me, huh?
bwasseo?
Do you feel me ,huh?
neodo neukkyeojyeo?
Hit the gas, Red line (Yes sir)
jeonsongnyeogeuro dallyeo
Write it down, Head line, (Getcha)
jeogeonaeryeo, hedeurain
That’s a move
That’s a move (That’s a move, that’s a move)
igeoji, jeo umjigimeul bwa
Breaking news
nyuseusokboya
Now she knows (Now she knows, now she knows)
ije geunyeoneun ara
She has had the wheel uh
haendeureun geunyeoga japgo isseotdan geol
24/7 it’s up to me
24/7 modu naege dallyeoisseo
Do you see me, huh?
boini?
Do you feel me, huh?
neodo neukkyeojyeo?
24/7 it’s up to me
24/7 modu naege dallyeoisseo
My hands on wheel
nae soni haendeul wie
The gun’s loaded
geu chongeun jangjeondoeeo itji
Walkin’, Runnin’, Crawlin’
geotgo, ttwigo, tto gieoseorado
I’ve never stopped, no playin’
yeotae jeoldae meomchun jeok eopseo, gabyeoun jeok eopji
Too many voice like popo
machi gyeongchalgateun neomu maneun moksorideure
I’m livin’ like forgot things
jungyohan geotdeureul itgo salgo isseonna bwa
Cause who pump it up, Uneasiness
waenyamyeon nugungga juipsikin buran, geokjeong, bulkwaeham
Like everybody’s justness
machi moduege jueojin tadanghamiraneun deut
Why did I think that was a given?
wae geuge dangyeonhadago saenggakhaesseulkka?
Stay or leave, left or right
namgeona tteonageona, oenjjok ttoneun oreunjjogeuro gageona
I decide it
naega jeonghae
Quote me
naega malhaetdago jeonhae
Whoo!
Quote me, quote me, quote me, oh
naega malhaetdago

Save me
nareul guwonhasoseo
eupjoryeo, God, Please lead me
eupjoryeo, sinisiyeo, nareul indohasoseo
Into the light
bicheul hyanghae
It’s been forever
jeongmal oraemmaniya
That I feel alive
saraisseumeul neukkin ge
(Let’s go back to the start)
(cheoeumeuro doragaja)

Whoo!
Never ending road
kkeuti eomneun gil
I’m so running out of breath
na neomu sumi cha
Whoo!
Can you hear their roar?
geudeurui pohyoreul deureonni?
It’s like tryna chat with me
machi naege mareul geoneun deuthae
All of my goosebumps up on me
nae ommome soreumi doda
Do you see me, huh?
bwasseo?
Do you feel me, huh?
neodo neukkyeojyeo?
All of my goosebumps up on me
nae ommome soreumi doda
Do you see me, huh?
bwasseo?
Do you feel me ,huh?
neodo neukkyeojyeo?
All of my goosebumps up on me
nae ommome soreumi doda
Do you see me, huh?
bwasseo?
Do you feel me ,huh?
neodo neukkyeojyeo?
All of my goosebumps up on me
nae ommome soreumi doda
My hands on wheel, On wheel
nae soni haendeul wie

Hit the gas, Red line
jeonsongnyeogeuro dallyeo
Write it down, Head line
jeogeonaeryeo, hedeurain
That’s a move
That’s a move
igeoji, jeo umjigimeul bwa
Breaking news
nyuseusokboya
Now she knows
ije geunyeoneun ara

So do not fear, for I am with you
Do not be dismayed, for I am your God
I will strengthen you and help you
I will uphold you with my righteous right hand
duryeowo malla naega neowa hamkke haminira
nollaji malla naneun ne hananimi doeminira
naega neoreul gutsege harira chameuro neoreul dowa jurira
chameuro naui uiroun oreunsoneuro neoreul butdeullira

Hangeul

Whoo!
Never ending road
끝이 없는 길
I’m so running out of breath
나 너무 숨이 차
Whoo!
Can you hear their roar?
그들의 포효를 들었니?
It’s like tryna chat with me
마치 내게 말을 거는 듯해
All of my goosebumps up on me
내 온몸에 소름이 돋아
Do you see me, huh?
봤어?
Do you feel me ,huh?
너도 느껴져?
All of my goosebumps up on me
내 온몸에 소름이 돋아
Do you see me, huh?
봤어?
Do you feel me ,huh?
너도 느껴져?
Hit the gas, Red line (Yes sir)
전속력으로 달려
Write it down, Head line, (Getcha)
적어내려, 헤드라인
That’s a move
That’s a move (That’s a move, that’s a move)
이거지, 저 움직임을 봐
Breaking news
뉴스속보야
Now she knows (Now she knows, now she knows)
이제 그녀는 알아
She has had the wheel uh
핸들은 그녀가 잡고 있었단 걸
24/7 it’s up to me
24/7 모두 내게 달려있어
Do you see me, huh?
보이니?
Do you feel me, huh?
너도 느껴져?
24/7 it’s up to me
24/7 모두 내게 달려있어
My hands on wheel
내 손이 핸들 위에
The gun’s loaded
그 총은 장전되어 있지
Walkin’, Runnin’, Crawlin’
걷고, 뛰고, 또 기어서라도
I’ve never stopped, no playin’
여태 절대 멈춘 적 없어, 가벼운 적 없지
Too many voice like popo
마치 경찰같은 너무 많은 목소리들에
I’m livin’ like forgot things
중요한 것들을 잊고 살고 있었나 봐
Cause who pump it up, Uneasiness
왜냐면 누군가 주입시킨 불안, 걱정, 불쾌함
Like everybody’s justness
마치 모두에게 주어진 타당함이라는 듯
Why did I think that was a given?
왜 그게 당연하다고 생각했을까?
Stay or leave, left or right
남거나 떠나거나, 왼쪽 또는 오른쪽으로 가거나
I decide it
내가 정해
Quote me
내가 말했다고 전해
Whoo!
Quote me, quote me, quote me, oh
내가 말했다고

Save me
나를 구원하소서
읊조려, God, Please lead me
읊조려, 신이시여, 나를 인도하소서
Into the light
빛을 향해
It’s been forever
정말 오랜만이야
That I feel alive
살아있음을 느낀 게
(Let’s go back to the start)
(처음으로 돌아가자)

Whoo!
Never ending road
끝이 없는 길
I’m so running out of breath
나 너무 숨이 차
Whoo!
Can you hear their roar?
그들의 포효를 들었니?
It’s like tryna chat with me
마치 내게 말을 거는 듯해
All of my goosebumps up on me
내 온몸에 소름이 돋아
Do you see me, huh?
봤어?
Do you feel me, huh?

Do you feel me ,huh?

내 온몸에 소름이 돋아

Do you feel me ,huh?
너도 느껴져?
All of my goosebumps up on me
내 온몸에 소름이 돋아
My hands on wheel, On wheel
내 손이 핸들 위에

Hit the gas, Red line
전속력으로 달려
Write it down, Head line
적어내려, 헤드라인
That’s a move
That’s a move
이거지, 저 움직임을 봐
Breaking news
뉴스속보야
Now she knows
이제 그녀는 알아

So do not fear, for I am with you
Do not be dismayed, for I am your God
I will strengthen you and help you
I will uphold you with my righteous right hand
두려워 말라 내가 너와 함께 함이니라
놀라지 말라 나는 네 하나님이 됨이니라
내가 너를 굳세게 하리라 참으로 너를 도와 주리라
참으로 나의 의로운 오른손으로 너를 붙들리라

mworaneun geoya?
